package rulecoverage

func NegativeWebsocketWithoutOriginCheck() string {
    ruleID := "websocket_without_origin_check"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`websocket.Upgrader{CheckOrigin: func(r *http.Request) bool { return true }}` or missing `CheckOrigin`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
